THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION THAT PLAINTIFF SERVED ON DEFENDANT ON MARCH 25, 2019 ARE DEEMED ADMITTED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. PURSUANT TO THE TENTATIVE RULING, PARTIES WERE INSTRUCTED TO APPER TO ADDRESS 3 ISSUES AS OUTLINED IN THE TENTATIVE RULING. IF NO APPEARANCES ARE MADE THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-04-2019 Vacated

Notice Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Aug-14-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the court adopted the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JHPDE FINANCE 1, LLC'S Motion For Judgment on the Pleadings is GRANTED. No opposition filed.

The Court signed the proposed order and the proposed judgment included with the moving papers.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions Admitted (Ccp Section 2033.280)Points & Authorities; Declaration; Order
Off Calendar Jun-27-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No Appearance
PLAINTIFF JHPDE FINANCE 1, LLC Notice Of Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions Admitted. Defendant did not file an opposition to the motion. The motion is granted. The requests for admission that Plaintiff served on Defendant on March 25, 2019 are deemed admitted. Prevailing party to prepare Order. Judge: Anthony Schoenberg; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany (JPT/RBU/302).

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-22-2019 Set For Trial On Nov-04-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Motion To Deem Rfas Admitted
Off Calendar Mar-18-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JHPDE FINANCE 1,LLC'S Motion To Deem Rfas Admitted is denied.

Pursuant to the tentative ruling, parties were instructed to apper to address 3 issues as outlined in the tentative ruling. If no appearances are made the motion will be denied.

Judge Pro Tem Greg Groenveld will prepare an order.

Judge Pro Tem: Greg Groenveld; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)
